question: Find the details of the customer who has never used any services .
sql: SELECT Customer_ID, Customer_Details FROM Customers WHERE Customer_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Customer_ID FROM Customers_and_Services UNION SELECT DISTINCT Customer_ID FROM Customer_Interactions)

back_translation.intent: 查找没有在服务或互动表中出现的客户信息
filters: Customer_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Customer_ID FROM Customers_and_Services UNION SELECT DISTINCT Customer_ID FROM Customer_Interactions)

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查找从未使用任何服务的客户信息，SQL通过排除在服务表（Customers_and_Services）和互动表（Customer_Interactions）中出现的客户ID，正确实现了该逻辑。过滤条件使用NOT IN结合UNION确保覆盖所有服务使用记录，且目标列Customer_Details符合要求。
